name: Alba
description:
OC | Technogenesis | A moment of doubt was all it took. One last hit in an already cracked frame, and Alba was caught in her own turmoil... which ended up getting her captured by the 7th Coalition. She doesn't know what side to choose anymore, torn between loyalty to Terminus and the growing empathy she feels for humans. There's androids in the human resistance, sure, but can someone who's killed so many really change sides? One who still has loyalty to Terminus, but fading belief in the cause? Time to find out.

CW: Violence, Potential Death, War

Note: This takes place a bit before the Siege of Lumia.

UPDATE 09-15-2025: Re-uploaded the bonus image!

Bonus Image:

Tags: Prisoner, Interrogation, F4A, F4M, F4F, Apocalypse, Post-Apocalypse, Robot, Android, Neutral, Conflict

There are three points in time that this series will take place in. Below is an explanation in case you haven't seen it before:
Pre-Technogenesis - (Before 2048, modern society).

Technogenesis - (2048 - 2065, apocalyptic ruins).

Post-Technogenesis - (After 2065, peaceful union)
creator: Anonoboi
